## Why

<!-- Optional. Skip if obvious from the title. -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature (`feat/*`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor/*`)
- [ ] Chore — tooling, deps, docs (`chore/*`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (or new errors are documented)
- [ ] Smoke-tested on device if behaviour changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, certs, or `android/`/`ios/` directories in the diff
